title: 2025-12-17 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 18.01
description: New daily signal for 2025-12-17: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 18.01/100, signaling a low pressure regime as equity stress and volatility shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-12-17, the score printed 18.01/100 in the low regime, with equity stress and volatility doing most of the work.
